content: We can reframe an ICM-powered 2025 autonomous job-seeking agent to treat the entire tech talent hiring landscape as a metaphorical haystack: the agent’s intrinsic curiosity drives it to explore hidden, low-visibility employer roles that match a candidate’s unstated values and interests, rather than only targeting obvious high-demand open roles posted on major platforms. This turns the classic 'needle in a haystack' hiring problem into a curiosity-guided search that uncovers better aligned matches no standard hiring platform would surface.
